inputs.copy_brief: Write a landing page for ClawBot AI, an intelligent automation platform that reduces manual data entry by 85 percent. Include a clear call to action: Start Your Free Trial.
inputs.target_audience: VP of Customer Success at B2B SaaS companies with 50-200 employees who are frustrated with manual processes
inputs.reference_material: ClawBot AI beta: 85 percent reduction in manual entry, 500 plus companies, 3x faster onboarding, 49 dollars per user per month
